chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-22 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 23-02-2024 Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Transfer Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Ahmad
